project_type: Static HTML website (personal branding site for Manulife insurance agent)
test_command: grep -rn 'Stella Elsya' . && grep -rn '6282255291890' . && grep -rn 'Kalimantan Barat' . && grep -rn 'Senior Manulife Agent' . && grep -rn 'Certified Financial Planner' .

directory_structure: Root contains PJ1.jpg, PJ2.jpg, standalone HTML file, and stella/ folder (main site with index.html, terms-and-conditions.html, script.js, styles.css, public/ assets)
